overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character recovering in a neon-lit alleyway, using a phasing ability to pass through a barrier wall, and emerging into a trash-filled corridor. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with Japanese neon signage, graffiti-covered concrete, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered back alley with debris and discarded containers

events.description: character begins rising from prone position on the wet ground
character stands up fully and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: lying on the ground in a back alley, then pushing up to a sitting position and standing

entered.detail: orange rusted barrel lying on its side near the character
discarded cardboard box with debris inside
concrete wall covered in black and white graffiti tags
vertical red neon sign with Japanese characters
metal chain-link barrier with barbed wire topping
tall cyan-blue residential tower with multiple balconies

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with the character lying prone in a narrow cyberpunk alleyway surrounded by trash and a rusted barrel. As the character rises, the camera reveals graffiti-covered walls, a chain-link fence barrier ahead, and a tall blue apartment building visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley approach to chain-link barrier with barbed wire

events.description: NPC pedestrian becomes visible walking along the graffiti wall in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the chain-link fence at the end of the alley

notable_agents.action: walking along the graffiti-covered wall away from the camera

entered.detail: coils of barbed wire topping the chain-link fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through the alley toward a chain-link fence topped with barbed wire. An NPC is visible in the distance walking along the graffiti wall. The blue apartment building remains visible on the left as the camera approaches the barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimensional phasing tunnel with swirling metal barrier

events.description: character activates phasing ability and enters the swirling metal tunnel through the wall
character exits the phase tunnel into the adjacent alley section

agents.ego_description: using a phasing ability to pass through the solid barrier, creating a swirling tunnel effect

entered.detail: spiraling vortex of twisted metal and barbed wire creating a passage through the wall
glowing blue circular tech interface visible during the phase shift
jagged metallic spikes protruding from the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The character activates a phasing ability and moves through a surreal swirling tunnel of twisted metal and barbed wire. The environment transforms into a dark dimensional passage with a circular holographic interface visible, eventually emerging into a different section of the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled service alley with neon signage and steam vents

events.description: steam vents activate releasing white vapor into the alley
distant pedestrians become visible near the alley exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the debris-filled alley toward the street exit, passing burning barrels and neon signs

notable_agents.action: distant figures standing near the alley exit gate

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign with geometric lettering on the right wall
cyan neon sign reading 'SHIMONOMO CHRONOS' with circular graphics
scattered garbage bags and debris covering the wet ground
metal barrel with active fire burning inside
vent releasing white steam into the alley atmosphere
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the alley exit

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the barrier, the character explores a trash-filled service alley illuminated by vibrant pink and cyan neon signs. Steam rises from vents in the ground, a burning barrel provides warm light, and distant figures are visible near the exit where an overhead walkway crosses above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that begins in a gritty, enclosed alleyway and transitions through a surreal dimensional rift into a neon-lit service corridor. It begins with the camera rising from a prone position amidst trash and rusted barrels, moving forward past graffiti-covered walls and a blue apartment building toward a barbed-wire fence. As the character reaches the barrier, the environment suddenly warps into a swirling tunnel of twisted metal and holographic interfaces, pulling the camera through a dark dimensional passage. The scene then emerges from this rift into a different section of the alley, where the lighting shifts to vibrant pink and cyan neon. Finally, the camera explores this new space, passing rising steam and a burning barrel before looking toward distant figures beneath an overhead walkway.
